_meta.note: In-circuit methods only. js-only (root/iter/history/path_for_leaf/first_free/find_path_for_leaf) and coin-conditional (writeCoin/insertCoin/pushFrontCoin) methods are intentionally omitted. Refresh procedure: re-read midnight-ledger.ss at the target compiler tag; confirm each via `compact compile --skip-zk` probes.

Counter.name: read
Counter.doc: Retrieves the current value of the counter.

Counter.name: lessThan
Counter.doc: Returns whether the counter is less than the given threshold.

Counter.name: increment
Counter.doc: Increments the counter by the given amount.

Counter.name: decrement
Counter.doc: Decrements the counter; going below zero is a run-time error.

Counter.name: resetToDefault
Counter.doc: Resets this Counter to its default value of 0.

Cell.name: read
Cell.doc: Returns the current contents of this Cell.

Cell.name: write
Cell.doc: Overwrites the content of this Cell with the given value.

Cell.name: resetToDefault
Cell.doc: Resets this Cell to the default value of its type.

Map.name: isEmpty
Map.doc: Returns if this Map is the empty map.

Map.name: size
Map.doc: Returns the number of entries in this Map.

Map.name: member
Map.doc: Returns if a key is contained within this Map.

Map.name: lookup
Map.doc: Looks up the value of a key; the value may itself be an ADT.

Map.name: insert
Map.doc: Updates this Map to include a new value at a given key.

Map.name: insertDefault
Map.doc: Inserts the value type's default value at a given key.

Map.name: remove
Map.doc: Updates this Map to not include a given key.

Map.name: resetToDefault
Map.doc: Resets this Map to the empty map.

Set.name: isEmpty
Set.doc: Returns whether this Set is the empty set.

Set.name: size
Set.doc: Returns the number of unique entries.

Set.name: member
Set.doc: Returns if an element is in this Set.

Set.name: insert
Set.doc: Updates this Set to include a given element.

Set.name: remove
Set.doc: Updates this Set to not include a given element.

Set.name: resetToDefault
Set.doc: Resets this Set to the empty set.

List.name: isEmpty
List.doc: Returns if this List is the empty list.

List.name: head
List.doc: Retrieves the head as a Maybe (safe on an empty list).

List.name: pushFront
List.doc: Pushes a new element onto the front.

List.name: popFront
List.doc: Removes the first element from the front.

List.name: resetToDefault
List.doc: Resets this List to the empty list.

MerkleTree.name: isFull
MerkleTree.doc: Returns if the tree is full and no further items can be directly inserted.

MerkleTree.name: checkRoot
MerkleTree.doc: Tests if rt is the current root of this tree.

MerkleTree.name: insert
MerkleTree.doc: Inserts a new leaf at the first free index.

MerkleTree.name: insertIndex
MerkleTree.doc: Inserts a new leaf at a specific index.

MerkleTree.name: insertHash
MerkleTree.doc: Inserts a leaf with a given hash at the first free index.

MerkleTree.name: insertHashIndex
MerkleTree.doc: Inserts a leaf with a given hash at a specific index.

MerkleTree.name: insertIndexDefault
MerkleTree.doc: Inserts a default-value leaf at an index (emulates removal).

MerkleTree.name: resetToDefault
MerkleTree.doc: Resets to the empty Merkle tree.

HistoricMerkleTree.name: isFull
HistoricMerkleTree.doc: Returns if the tree is full.

HistoricMerkleTree.name: checkRoot
HistoricMerkleTree.doc: Tests if rt is one of the past roots of this tree.

HistoricMerkleTree.name: insert
HistoricMerkleTree.doc: Inserts a leaf at the first free index and records the new root in history.

HistoricMerkleTree.name: insertIndex
HistoricMerkleTree.doc: Inserts a leaf at a specific index and records the new root.

HistoricMerkleTree.name: insertHash
HistoricMerkleTree.doc: Inserts a leaf with a given hash at the first free index.

HistoricMerkleTree.name: insertHashIndex
HistoricMerkleTree.doc: Inserts a leaf with a given hash at a specific index.

HistoricMerkleTree.name: insertIndexDefault
HistoricMerkleTree.doc: Inserts a default-value leaf at an index.

HistoricMerkleTree.name: resetHistory
HistoricMerkleTree.doc: Resets the history, leaving only the current root valid.

HistoricMerkleTree.name: resetToDefault
HistoricMerkleTree.doc: Resets to the empty Merkle tree.

Kernel.name: checkpoint
Kernel.doc: Marks execution up to this point as one atomic unit.

Kernel.name: claimZswapNullifier
Kernel.doc: Requires the nullifier's presence in the tx, claimed by no other call.

Kernel.name: claimZswapCoinSpend
Kernel.doc: Requires a commitment in the tx claimed as a spend by no other call.

Kernel.name: claimZswapCoinReceive
Kernel.doc: Requires a commitment in the tx claimed as a receive by no other call.

Kernel.name: claimContractCall
Kernel.sig: claimContractCall(addr: Bytes<32>, entry_point: Bytes<32>, comm: Field): []
Kernel.doc: Requires a matching contract-to-contract call in the tx, unclaimed by others.

Kernel.name: mintShielded
Kernel.doc: Mints shielded coins of a token type derived from the contract address + domain sep.

Kernel.name: mintUnshielded
Kernel.doc: Mints unshielded coins of a derived token type.

Kernel.name: claimUnshieldedCoinSpend
Kernel.sig: claimUnshieldedCoinSpend(token_type: Either<Bytes<32>, Bytes<32>>, address: Either<ContractAddress, UserAddress>, amount: Uint<128>): []
Kernel.doc: Authorizes an unshielded coin of the given type to be transferred to an address.

Kernel.name: incUnshieldedOutputs
Kernel.doc: Increments unshielded output for a token type (used when sending).

Kernel.name: incUnshieldedInputs
Kernel.doc: Increments unshielded input for a token type (used when receiving).

Kernel.name: balance
Kernel.doc: Returns the contract's unshielded balance of a token type.

Kernel.name: balanceLessThan
Kernel.sig: balanceLessThan(token_type: Either<Bytes<32>, Bytes<32>>, amount: Uint<128>): Boolean
Kernel.doc: Whether the balance of a token type is less than the given amount.

Kernel.name: balanceGreaterThan
Kernel.sig: balanceGreaterThan(token_type: Either<Bytes<32>, Bytes<32>>, amount: Uint<128>): Boolean
Kernel.doc: Whether the balance of a token type is greater than the given amount.

Kernel.name: blockTimeLessThan
Kernel.doc: Whether current block time is less than time (seconds since the Unix epoch).

Kernel.name: blockTimeGreaterThan
Kernel.doc: Whether current block time is greater than time.
